hero.description: A front‑end developer focused on <1>React</1> and <3>TypeScript</3>. Passionate about building fast, responsive, and beautiful UIs.

about.title: About Me
about.text1: A <1>Front‑End</1> developer focusing on component architecture, implementing <3>scalable</3> and <5>Performance‑Optimized</5> interfaces. Clean, testable code and <7>Accessibility</7> standards are my priorities.
about.text2: With over <1>X years of experience</1> building modern apps with <3>React, Next.js, TypeScript</3> and advanced state management (<5>Zustand, Redux Toolkit</5>), I specialize in optimizing <7>Core Web Vitals</7> and implementing <9>Micro‑Frontend</9> architecture.
about.text3: Active in open‑source, committed to <1>continuous learning</1> and following the latest trends in the <3>React</3> ecosystem. Experienced in agile international teams, setting up <5>CI/CD</5> and writing <7>E2E</7> tests with Cypress/Playwright.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: Ready to collaborate and hear your ideas.
